stemHtml:
During an uneventful long-haul flight on a transoceanic route, you start to feel bored and hypovigilance begins to set in. Select from the following list of appropriate actions and countermeasures.

1. Strictly adhere to SOPs
2. Disconnect the autopilot and fly manually
3. Play with the different autopilot controls
4. Communicate with the other crew member(s)
5. Rehearse abnormal or emergency procedures
